EventData.Data:
Category: Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Model.Validation EventId: 20601
The 'TicketStatus' property 'Status' on entity type 'Ticket' is configured with a database-generated default, but has no configured sentinel value. The database-generated default will always be used for inserts when the property has the value '0', since this is the CLR default for the 'TicketStatus' type. Consider using a nullable type, using a nullable backing field, or setting the sentinel value for the property to ensure the database default is used when, and only when, appropriate. See https://aka.ms/efcore-docs-default-values for more information.

Category: Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Connection EventId: 20004
An error occurred using the connection to database 'TicketSystemDB' on server '.'.
